title: Tugboat Princess
writer: Isadore Bernstein, Dalton Trumbo, Robert Watson
actors: Walter C. Kelly, Valerie Hobson, Edith Fellows
plot: Another of the "run-away" productions made by Columbia in Canada in the mid-30's designed to either comply with or to circumvent the British Quota Law of the period, with Walter C. Kelly and Edith Fellows the only American citizen...
